items.title: Chase Ultimate Rewards offering 65% transfer bonus to Marriott
items.summary: Today, Chase launched a 65% transfer bonus to Marriott Bonvoy, meaning you’ll get 1.65 Bonvoy points for every Ultimate Reward point that you transfer until May 15th. Chase runs transfer bonuses to Marriott Bonvoy a couple of times each year, but they’re usually in the 20%-50% range. Thi

items.title: Have the Chase Sapphire Preferred? You're likely eligible for the Sapphire Reserve. Here's how
items.summary: If you currently have the Chase Sapphire Preferred, you're still eligible for the Chase Sapphire Reserve's high welcome bonus and luxury perks. What to know.

items.title: Earn 80K miles on the Citi AAdvantage Platinum Select card with no first year annual fee
items.summary: Citi and American Airlines have a boosted welcome offer on the Citi AAdvantage Platinum Select World Elite Mastercard. items.summary: Chase has increased the bonus on the Chase Sapphire Reserve to 150,000 points, offer is also available via referral. Chase is only matching if you applied on or after 4/20. items.title: Chase Sapphire Reserve review: A premium card for power travelers
items.summary: A premium travel card with high earnings, flexible credits and valuable points. See why the Chase Sapphire Reserve can be worth its high annual fee.
